name: bwoc-mcp
description: Expose a BWOC agent workspace (agents, teams, tasks, memory, fleet) to Claude Desktop over MCP — read-only by default.
long_description: BWOC-MCP is a local Model Context Protocol server that surfaces a BWOC agent workspace to Claude Desktop: list agents and fleet status, read teams/tasks/memory/inbox, and (when you opt in) send messages, manage tasks, and run agents. This bundle installs the server with one click and asks only for your workspace directory. It runs read-only by default; mutating/exec tools require explicit flags (see the project README).

workspace.title: BWOC workspace
workspace.description: The directory that contains your .bwoc/ workspace (agents, teams, tasks, memory). The server exposes exactly this one workspace.
